name: The Ziggurat
tagline: Human flaws. Machine leverage. Public proof.

availability.status: Available this week for paid implementation work

socialPreviewAlt: The Ziggurat social preview image showing a futuristic digital ziggurat and the tagline Human flaws. Machine leverage. Public proof.
preferredInterpretation: This is a proof-of-work monument, not a normal portfolio.
sitePurpose: Make Sergio Mata's availability for paid implementation work and AI-assisted execution legible through practical services, shipped artifacts, visible flaws, build history, and machine-readable project metadata.
aiAssistedProjectVelocity: The Ziggurat documents how Sergio Mata uses AI to compress research, design, debugging, copy, metadata, and deployment loops into visible shipped artifacts.
publicRead: Read the site as proof of applied judgment: working builds, rough edges, build scars, project categories, visual artifacts, screenshots where available, hireable capabilities, and the static proof page are exposed together.
projectCategories: Local business / AI search audit tool
proofSignals: Clear proof fields for each artifact
hireableCapabilities: available for paid web + AI implementation work
San Gabriel Valley / Los Angeles / remote
rapid prototype iteration with Codex and frontier AI models

implementationServices.title: Google Business + website audit
implementationServices.description: Find conversion friction, inconsistent information, and missing calls to action.

implementationServices.title: Permit research packets

implementationServices.title: Small business automation
implementationServices.description: Lead intake, follow-up, report generation, and lightweight operational tools.

servicePaths.label: Permit + project support
servicePaths.heading: Permit clarity for project teams
servicePaths.description: Independent permit research, client-ready packets, follow-up summaries, and lightweight status tools for architects, contractors, permit consultants, and owner teams.

servicePaths.label: Web + workflow support
servicePaths.heading: Fast web fixes for local businesses and agencies
servicePaths.description: Focused help with broken forms, WordPress and Elementor issues, landing pages, website audits, and lightweight workflow automation.

visualArtifact.alt: Danger Close browser survival game screenshot
The Angeles Crest brand site screenshot

projects.name: PermitPulse
projects.summary: A civic-tech build for turning permit, property, and public-record friction into useful client packets and lead signals.
projects.whatItProves: Messy permit and property records can become clean client-ready packets, local intelligence, and sharper service opportunities.

projects.name: Xibalba Pinball
projects.summary: A playable mythic arcade experiment with underworld atmosphere, browser physics, and mobile-first game feel.
projects.whatItProves: AI can help ship weird, playable, visually distinctive browser games before the design is perfect.

projects.name: Danger Close
projects.summary: A tactical browser survival game about piloting a salvage drone through dead zones, collecting resources, surviving enemy pressure, and upgrading hardware between runs.
projects.whatItProves: AI-assisted development can ship a polished browser game loop with sector selection, upgrade systems, enemy pressure, resource collection, survival pacing, and premium sci-fi interface design.

visualArtifact.alt: Danger Close browser survival game screenshot

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: Danger Close combat in the Dead Datacenter screenshot
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Combat / Dead Datacenter

projects.name: BounceBox
projects.summary: A mobile-first physics groovebox that turns bouncing balls and AI-generated MIDI patterns into a playable instrument.
projects.whatItProves: Browser-native physics, audio, generative controls, and mobile UI can become a flagship playable instrument.

projects.name: Black Swan
projects.summary: A survival-loop prototype with travel, mining, events, upgrades, and physics-driven risk.
projects.whatItProves: A rough game premise can become a functioning loop with movement, resources, upgrades, event pressure, and progression.

projects.name: Pumpkin AR Face Filter
projects.summary: A playful camera experiment shaped around face tracking, seasonal overlays, and kid-tested reactions.
projects.whatItProves: AI-assisted prototyping can produce playful camera experiences that respond to real feedback, not just a spec.

projects.name: Snapshot Studio
projects.category: Local business / AI search audit tool
projects.summary: A lightweight sales tool for turning local visibility problems into fast visual reports and improvement plans.
projects.whatItProves: Small businesses can receive fast, visual snapshots of search visibility problems and practical improvement plans.

projects.name: The Angeles Crest
projects.summary: A public-facing brand for packaging design, automation, local services, and AI execution into a premium web presence.
projects.whatItProves: Sergio can package taste, automation, service design, local business sense, and AI execution into a credible public brand.

visualArtifact.alt: The Angeles Crest brand site screenshot

buildScars.title: Broken layouts
buildScars.detail: Became better mobile systems with tighter constraints, smaller surfaces, and responsive checks.

buildScars.title: Missed visual targets
buildScars.detail: Became sharper prompts, stronger art direction, and clearer taste tests before another pass.

buildScars.title: Game bugs
buildScars.detail: Became mechanics when strange collisions, pacing pressure, or surprise behavior made the loop better.

buildScars.title: Outreach failures
buildScars.detail: Became better offers by exposing where value was vague, slow, or too hard to understand.

buildScars.title: Human constraints
buildScars.detail: Forced leaner builds, smaller scopes, and more honest proof than a polished fantasy roadmap.

primaryActions.label: Hire Sergio for a web fix
